---
name: Bug report
about: Report  something as not working as intended or having unwanted side effects
title: ''
labels: Bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior, i.e. change this setting, register a tool with this definition...

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
